description_en: A traditional Ming dynasty official hat chair, characterized by a tall back panel, armrests, and a curved top rail. The chair is known for its elegance and simplicity in design.

components.name: back_panel
components.description: The tall back panel of the chair

components.name: seat
components.position_note: at the base of the back panel

components.name: armrest
components.position_note: extending from the back panel to the front of the seat

components.name: leg
components.position_note: four corners of the seat base

components.name: top_rail
components.description: The curved top rail of the chair
components.position_note: connecting the back panel and armrests

style_notes: Elegant and simple Ming dynasty style, with a curved top rail and a tall back panel. Legs are proportionate to the overall height, following traditional Ming proportions.
